overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage depicting a futuristic urban night scene with vibrant neon lighting. The camera follows a purple-haired character through a covered commercial walkway, continues exploring solo past storefronts and NPCs, then switches to following an NCPD police officer down a street lined with holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with glass roof

events.description: purple-haired character moves left and exits the frame, camera continues forward solo

agents.ego_description: following a purple-haired character wearing a white jacket and red shorts through a covered neon-lit walkway

notable_agents.action: walking steadily ahead, occasionally glancing at surroundings, then moving left to exit frame

entered.detail: transparent glass and metal roof structure covering the pedestrian walkway with pink neon lighting
tall building with dark glass windows and metallic frames lining the walkway
vertical structural columns with glowing pink and purple neon lights
multi-lane city street with moving cars and taxis visible through the pillars

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a purple-haired character through a covered urban walkway at night. The environment features a glass roof with pink neon lighting, modern glass buildings on the left, and a busy street visible to the right. The character walks steadily forward before exiting the frame to the left around the 10-second mark.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian arcade with commercial buildings

events.description: approaching the end of the covered walkway, tall concrete building becomes visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking forward through the covered walkway, passing NPCs standing against walls and near doorways

notable_agents.action: man leaning against the building wall looking at a device in his hands

entered.detail: pile of green and red shipping containers and crates on the sidewalk edge
large brutalist concrete structure visible at the end of the walkway corridor

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the covered walkway without the leading character, the camera passes by NPCs leaning against walls and stacks of cargo containers. The corridor opens up ahead revealing a tall concrete building at the terminus, while the neon-lit pillars pass by on the right. The environment maintains its sheltered, artificially lit atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial street corner with storefronts

events.description: exits covered walkway into open plaza area with visible sky and storefronts
passing the green Prefab City storefront with cardboard boxes stacked outside

agents.ego_description: turning right at the intersection and walking past various storefronts including Prefab City and a noodle shop

notable_agents.action: pedestrian carrying a glowing purple umbrella walking toward the camera

entered.detail: green storefront with orange neon signage reading PREFAB CITY, displaying various items inside
blue and yellow automated vending machine with glowing interface
small eatery with red awning and counter visible, adjacent to the Prefab City store
wet asphalt plaza with scattered debris and neon reflections, surrounded by commercial buildings

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the covered walkway into an open plaza area with wet asphalt reflecting neon lights. The Prefab City store with its distinctive green facade and orange signage dominates the left side, alongside a noodle shop and vending machine. A pedestrian with a glowing purple umbrella walks past as the camera continues down the commercial street.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit downtown street with digital billboards

events.description: camera switches to following an NCPD police officer wearing dark tactical gear

agents.ego_description: following an NCPD officer from behind as he walks down the sidewalk past digital billboards and construction barriers

notable_agents.action: NCPD officer walking with purposeful stride, wearing dark uniform with NCPD lettering on the back

entered.detail: large curved wall covered with glowing digital advertisements and holographic displays showing various products
red and white striped barriers lining the edge of the sidewalk next to the street
massive concrete overpass and highway infrastructure visible overhead with support columns
multiple layers of glowing signs and billboards extending across the street creating a canopy of light

segments.scene_description: The perspective switches to follow an NCPD officer walking down a neon-drenched city street. The left side features a massive curved wall of digital billboards displaying advertisements, while construction barriers line the right side adjacent to a street with moderate traffic. Overhead, elevated highway structures and layers of neon signage create a dense urban canopy characteristic of Night City.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sheltered neon corridor that gradually opens into a vibrant, rain-slicked urban plaza. It begins by following a purple-haired character beneath a glass roof illuminated by pink neon, moving past modern glass buildings and a busy adjacent street. As the character exits the frame, the camera continues forward through the walkway, passing NPCs and cargo containers while the sheltered space stretches toward a distant concrete building. The scene then expands as the camera exits the covered area and emerges into an open plaza where wet asphalt reflects the surrounding lights. Finally, the view glides down a commercial street past a green-facaded Prefab City store and a noodle shop, crossing paths with a pedestrian carrying a glowing purple umbrella.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement tracking an NCPD officer through a dense, neon-drenched urban corridor. It begins by trailing the officer as they walk down a city street, where the perspective is framed by a massive curved wall of digital billboards on the left. As the camera moves forward, the view expands to reveal construction barriers lining the right side adjacent to a street with moderate traffic. The scene then shifts upward to encompass the towering layers of neon signage and elevated highway structures that form a claustrophobic urban canopy overhead.
